title: Promotions & Discounts Management
subtitle: Manage discount codes and promotional campaigns to drive bookings.

actions.create_failed: Failed to create promotion. Please check details.
actions.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the promotion code {{code}}?

fields.name: Campaign Name
fields.name_help: Display name or purpose of the promotion
fields.description_help: Detailed conditions for applying the code
fields.max_discount_amount_help: Cap maximum discount for percentage type (leave empty if unlimited)
fields.min_order_amount_help: Booking value must reach this to apply (0 = no limit)
fields.usage_limit_help: Total times this code can be used in the system (leave empty if unlimited)
fields.usage_per_user_help: Max times a single customer/account can use this code

validation.code_min: Discount code must be at least 3 characters.
validation.code_pattern: Discount code can only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.
validation.discount_value_min: Discount value must be greater than 0.
validation.min_order_amount_min: Minimum order amount must be at least 0.
validation.usage_limit_min: Total usage limit must be at least 1.
validation.usage_per_user_min: Usage limit per user must be at least 1.
validation.ends_at_after_starts_at: End date must be after start date.
